title: If I cant have you all to myself
display_title: If I cant have you all to myself
wikitext:
[]: "If I can't have you all to myself......"             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Feb 17, 2009 7:21 pm What Asuka mean in EOE when she told Shinji "If I can't have you all to myself then I don't want anything from you!"?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 17, 2009 7:34 pm She means exactly what she said. To expound, Asuka's feelings for Shinji and abandonment issues have combined to give her a very possessive, immature sort of attachment. She wants Shinji all to herself, to abuse or love whenever she chooses as her mood and emotional needs dictate. She would rather not see him at all if it can't be on her own terms, because he would only be a reminder of what she would perceive as a failure on her part to successfully lure him in; 'obviously' only possible if there is something wrong or lacking within her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 17, 2009 7:35 pm Asuka wants Shinji to either be her lover, or she wants nothing to do with him. This was discussed in some other threads; I can't find the exact links right now. As an aside, Asuka was also implying she'd rather be Shinji's main course instead of his side dish . For those who don't believe me, notice how Asuka's thrusting her breasts in his face during that scene; she seems pretty serious about what she's saying there. The scene goes like this, just FYI: Asuka: You moron. I know you're just using me to comfort you. Why don't you do it now, like you always do? I'll be watching you. If all of you can't be mine, I don't want anything. Shinji: Then why don't you be kind to me? Misato, Rei & Asuka: I am.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Feb 17, 2009 7:35 pm Sounds like me...

[]:             Quote Post by nozunam » Wed Feb 18, 2009 1:02 am or in other words she wants all or nothing at all she's greedy, i like that

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Feb 18, 2009 10:04 am Shinji should thank his lucky stars that he doesn't have a pet bunny-rabbit to take care of.
